use_codes.desc: TOPICAL TREATMENT OF PRIMARY AXILLARY HYPERHIDROSIS IN ADULTS AND PEDIATRIC PATIENTS 9 YEARS OF AGE AND OLDER

indications.text:
Qbrexza is indicated for topical treatment of primary axillary hyperhidrosis in adult and pediatric
patients 9 years of age and older.

Qbrexza is indicated for topical treatment of primary axillary hyperhidrosis in adult and pediatric
patients 9 years of age and older.
